sharedStateObservations.description: Memory files use markdown format with ## headings for categories. Personal memory has 3 categories (Personal Preferences, Decision Patterns, Learning Notes), Project memory has 5 categories (Architecture Decisions, Technical Debt, Domain Knowledge, Team Conventions, Project Patterns).
Personal memory stored at ~/.factory/memories.md, Project memory at .factory/memories.md (relative to project root). Files use UTF-8 encoding for international text support.
